title: Edit Decision List (EDL)
description: Single source-of-truth artifact for the edit-video workflow. Authored by the LLM, consumed by helpers/render.py.

sources.description: Map of source ID → absolute path to the source video file.

ranges.description: Ordered list of cuts. Concatenated head-to-tail to form the output. start/end are in source-clip time.

start.description: Start time in seconds (must fall on a word boundary from the transcript)

end.description: End time in seconds (must fall on a word boundary from the transcript)

beat.description: Narrative tag (e.g. HOOK, PROBLEM, SOLUTION, CTA)

quote.description: Verbatim text spoken in this range, for human review

reason.description: Why this take was chosen — for re-edit context

oneOf.description: Preset name (e.g. 'warm_cinematic', 'neutral_punch', 'none') or a raw ffmpeg filter string

grade.description: Color grade. Applied per-segment during extract — never post-concat.

overlays.description: Animation clips composited on top. start_in_output is in OUTPUT timeline (not source time).

file.description: Path to overlay video (typically PIL/Manim/HyperFrames render)

start_in_output.description: When the overlay enters in the output timeline (seconds)

subtitles.description: Path to master SRT. Applied LAST in the filter chain (after every overlay) — Hard Rule 1.

total_duration_s.description: Expected output duration in seconds. render.py verifies actual output via ffprobe.
